description: Backup/Restore Complete Test Matrix - Performance Labs (2000 workspaces per test)

custom_tests.name: backup_2000_single_ns_external_correct
custom_tests.args: --mode binary --max-vus 300 --max-devworkspaces 2000 --delete-devworkspace-after-ready false --separate-namespaces false --devworkspace-ready-timeout-seconds 3000 --test-duration-minutes 50 --run-backup-test-hook true --dwoc-config-type correct --registry-path quay.io/rohan.kanojia --registry-secret quay-push-secret --backup-wait-minutes 45
custom_tests.description: Single namespace + External registry (quay.io) + Correct config

custom_tests.name: backup_2000_single_ns_external_incorrect
custom_tests.args: --mode binary --max-vus 300 --max-devworkspaces 2000 --delete-devworkspace-after-ready false --separate-namespaces false --devworkspace-ready-timeout-seconds 3000 --test-duration-minutes 50 --run-backup-test-hook true --dwoc-config-type incorrect --registry-path quay.io/rohan.kanojia --registry-secret quay-push-secret --backup-wait-minutes 45
custom_tests.description: Single namespace + External registry (quay.io) + Incorrect config (typo)

custom_tests.name: backup_2000_single_ns_internal_correct
custom_tests.description: Single namespace + OpenShift internal registry + Correct config (auto-detect)

custom_tests.name: backup_2000_single_ns_internal_incorrect
custom_tests.description: Single namespace + OpenShift internal registry + Incorrect config (invalid registry)

custom_tests.name: backup_2000_separate_ns_external_correct
custom_tests.args: --mode binary --max-vus 300 --max-devworkspaces 2000 --delete-devworkspace-after-ready false --separate-namespaces true --devworkspace-ready-timeout-seconds 3000 --test-duration-minutes 50 --run-backup-test-hook true --dwoc-config-type correct --registry-path quay.io/rohan.kanojia --registry-secret quay-push-secret --backup-wait-minutes 45
custom_tests.description: Separate namespaces + External registry (quay.io) + Correct config

custom_tests.name: backup_2000_separate_ns_external_incorrect
custom_tests.args: --mode binary --max-vus 300 --max-devworkspaces 2000 --delete-devworkspace-after-ready false --separate-namespaces true --devworkspace-ready-timeout-seconds 3000 --test-duration-minutes 50 --run-backup-test-hook true --dwoc-config-type incorrect --registry-path quay.io/rohan.kanojia --registry-secret quay-push-secret --backup-wait-minutes 45
custom_tests.description: Separate namespaces + External registry (quay.io) + Incorrect config (typo)

custom_tests.name: backup_2000_separate_ns_internal_correct
custom_tests.description: Separate namespaces + OpenShift internal registry + Correct config (auto-detect)

custom_tests.name: backup_2000_separate_ns_internal_incorrect
custom_tests.description: Separate namespaces + OpenShift internal registry + Incorrect config (invalid registry)
